--- title: "Ledarskap" title-block-banner: "#009ca6" title-block-banner-color: "#FFFFFF" format: html execute: echo: true warning: false message: false cache: true editor_options: chunk_output_type: console --- ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-1_46d8977156967238ec0246bee1b42f9e'} ```{.r .cell-code} library(foreign) library(readxl) library(RISEkbmRasch) # devtools::install_github("pgmj/RISEkbmRasch") library(grateful) # devtools::install_github("Pakillo/grateful") library(ggrepel) library(car) library(kableExtra) library(readxl) library(tidyverse) library(eRm) library(mirt) library(psych) library(ggplot2) library(psychotree) library(matrixStats) library(reshape) library(knitr) library(cowplot) library(formattable) library(glue) library(hexbin) library(skimr) ### some commands exist in multiple packages, here we define preferred ones that are frequently used select <- dplyr::select count <- dplyr::count recode <- car::recode rename <- dplyr::rename # file paths will need to have "../" added at the beginning to be able to render document # get itemlabels itemlabels <- read_excel("../data/Itemlabels.xlsx") %>% filter(str_detect(itemnr, pattern = "ls")) %>% select(!Dimension) spssDatafil <- "../data/2023-04-26 Prevent OSA-enkat.sav" # read SurveyMonkey data df <- read.spss(spssDatafil, to.data.frame = TRUE) %>% select(starts_with("q0010"),q0001,q0002,q0003,q0004) %>% rename(Kön = q0002, Ålder = q0001, Bransch = q0003, Hemarbete = q0004) # SPSS format provides itemlabels too, we can save them in a dataframe spssLabels <- df %>% attr('variable.labels') %>% as.data.frame() dif.kön <- df$Kön dif.ålder <- df$Ålder dif.bransch <- df$Bransch dif.hemarbete <- df$Hemarbete df <- df %>% select(starts_with("q0010")) names(df) <- itemlabels$itemnr ``` ::: ## Items ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-2_47a23985f49dd3b25a318b417a2123d8'} ```{.r .cell-code} itemlabels %>% kbl_rise(width = 60) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
itemnr item
ls1 Min chef ger mig återkoppling på hur jag utför arbetet.
ls2 Min chef har en god uppfattning om min arbetsbelastning.
ls3 Min chef agerar om jag har allt för mycket arbete att utföra.
ls4 Min chef ser till att alla kommer till tals.
ls5 Min chef hanterar konflikter på ett bra sätt.
ls6 Min chef och jag har tillräckligt med avstämningar.
````` ::: ::: ## Bakgrundsdata ::: panel-tabset ### Kön ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-3_7ffccc1c068a7d677f5cf68e1f90653f'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.kön,"Kön") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Kön n Percent
Kvinna 402 69.7
Man 172 29.8
Annat 1 0.2
Vill ej uppge 2 0.3
````` ::: ::: ### Ålder ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-4_22b5677f458cec7ff56b5fbaf1bdaed1'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.ålder,"Ålder") # kanske även fixa en figur? ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Ålder n Percent
18-29 22 3.8
30-39 103 17.8
40-49 175 30.2
50-59 215 37.1
60+ 64 11.1
````` ::: ::: ### Bransch ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-5_b9f840cc054776dc7f35e3d08eab61e3'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.bransch,"Bransch") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Bransch n Percent
Kontorsarbete (oavsett bransch) 284 49.1
Industri 26 4.5
Hotell, restaurang, service 8 1.4
Handel 16 2.8
Skola, utbildning 67 11.6
Vård, omsorg 99 17.1
Byggverksamhet 7 1.2
Annat 71 12.3
````` ::: ::: ### Arbete hemifrån ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-6_e8d92184cf70f1785ddc1831bf1311c6'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.hemarbete,"Antal dagar med arbete hemifrån") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Antal dagar med arbete hemifrån n Percent
En dag 136 23.5
Två dagar 105 18.1
Tre dagar 35 6.0
Fyra dagar 10 1.7
Fem dagar 2 0.3
Jag arbetar aldrig eller sällan hemifrån 291 50.3
````` ::: ::: ::: ### Svarsbortfall items Vi filtrerar bort respondenter som har färre än två svar på frågorna i delskalan. ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-7_6951421b3f15260f99660d08d4cc0a40'} ```{.r .cell-code} # If you want to include participants with missing data, input the minimum number of items responses that a participant should have to be included in the analysis: min.responses <- 2 scale.items <- itemlabels$itemnr # Select the variables we will work with, and filter out respondents with a lot of missing data df.omit.na <- df %>% filter(length(scale.items)-rowSums(is.na(.[scale.items])) >= min.responses) RImissing(df.omit.na,"ls") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: Vi har extremt få saknade svar, och tar därför bort respondenterna som inte har kompletta svar. ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-8_7cecad7f452628b88749882df7cd0f3f'} ```{.r .cell-code} df <- read.spss(spssDatafil, to.data.frame = TRUE) %>% select(starts_with("q0010"),q0001,q0002,q0003,q0004) %>% rename(Kön = q0002, Ålder = q0001, Bransch = q0003, Hemarbete = q0004) %>% na.omit() dif.kön <- df$Kön dif.ålder <- df$Ålder dif.bransch <- df$Bransch dif.hemarbete <- df$Hemarbete df <- df %>% select(starts_with("q0010")) names(df) <- itemlabels$itemnr df.omit.na <- df ``` ::: ### Alla svar för alla frågor ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-9_b547004929c5c19922e55ef30087b615'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIallresp(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}
Response category Number of responses Percent
Alltid 497 17.4
Mycket ofta 712 24.9
Ganska ofta 665 23.2
Ibland 494 17.3
Sällan 347 12.1
Aldrig 147 5.1
::: ::: ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-10_aedb64ec2ea12fa018d70f595b8b86aa'} ```{.r .cell-code} # koda om svarskategorier till siffror df.omit.na <- df.omit.na %>% mutate(across(everything(), ~ car::recode(.x,"'Aldrig'=0; 'Sällan' =1; 'Ibland'=2; 'Ganska ofta'=3; 'Mycket ofta'=4; 'Alltid'=5", as.factor = FALSE))) ``` ::: ### Descriptives - all items ::: panel-tabset #### Tile plot ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-11_b3c0dd54898b031f3cac6bf023e9f41f'} ```{.r .cell-code} RItileplot(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### Stacked bars ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-12_b949319c04a3cd0033724f7835ba7d1c'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIbarstack(df.omit.na) + ylab("Item") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### Barplots ::: {.cell layout-ncol="2" hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-13_011e7aefe4f0a6d508687f8aed4eff4b'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIbarplot(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-5.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-6.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: Vi har tillräckligt många svar för samtliga svarskategorier och items så vi går vidare och utför analysen. ## Rasch-analys 1 ::: {.cell .column-margin hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-14_88cbbe71bb7b303754f97f191c1d5e77'} ::: {.cell-output-display}
itemnr item
ls1 Min chef ger mig återkoppling på hur jag utför arbetet.
ls2 Min chef har en god uppfattning om min arbetsbelastning.
ls3 Min chef agerar om jag har allt för mycket arbete att utföra.
ls4 Min chef ser till att alla kommer till tals.
ls5 Min chef hanterar konflikter på ett bra sätt.
ls6 Min chef och jag har tillräckligt med avstämningar.
::: ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Item fit ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-15_f50e43cbbee9f3608407231bda3eb2c8'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemfitPCM2(df.omit.na, samplesize = 250, nsamples = 32, cpu = 8) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
OutfitMSQ InfitMSQ OutfitZSTD InfitZSTD
ls1 0.815 0.772 -2.211 -2.681
ls2 0.754 0.764 -3.148 -2.947
ls3 0.87 0.832 -1.36 -1.909
ls4 0.821 0.853 -1.866 -1.575
ls5 0.926 0.932 -0.639 -0.718
ls6 0.929 0.97 -0.6 -0.26
````` ::: ::: ### PCA ::: {.cell tbl-cap='PCA of Rasch model residuals' hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-16_4a6a9c3084c04355e0144f4e438963db'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIpcmPCA(na.omit(df.omit.na)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Eigenvalues
1.92
1.38
0.99
0.93
0.77
````` ::: ::: ### Residual correlations ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-17_7df25f9aaf020bad7a003d1964c36bf8'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIresidcorr(df.omit.na, cutoff = 0.2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
ls1 ls2 ls3 ls4 ls5 ls6
ls1
ls2 0.03
ls3 -0.09 0.09
ls4 -0.36 -0.32 -0.27
ls5 -0.35 -0.41 -0.29 0.23
ls6 -0.03 -0.18 -0.33 -0.26 -0.25
Note:
Relative cut-off value (highlighted in red) is 0.013, which is 0.2 above the average correlation.
````` ::: ::: ### 1st contrast loadings ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-18_64d714e6330b65d605b3a74c213a5901'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIloadLoc(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-18-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Analysis of response categories ::: {.cell layout-ncol="2" hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-19_debf7826db15c3d7be59158b6f0f0799'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemCats(df.omit.na, items = "all") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-5.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-6.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Targeting ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-20_bbb85b7358ab953f1821da52e4af767e'} ```{.r .cell-code} # increase fig-height above as needed, if you have many items RItargeting(df.omit.na, xlim = c(-5,5)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-20-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Item hierarchy ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-21_c4c4b51561546f6616ee932a44bb5045'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemHierarchy(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: Överlag ser analysens utfall bra ut. Dock finns det en residualkorrelation mellan ls4 och ls5 klart över rekommenderade gränsvärden. Vi testar att ta bort ls4 från vidare analys. ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-22_ed6c1e43c57b2425462bf03184453541'} ```{.r .cell-code} # create vector with eliminated items removed_items <- c("ls4") # select all items except those removed df2 <- df.omit.na %>% select(!all_of(removed_items)) ``` ::: ## Rasch-analys 2 ::: {.cell .column-margin hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-23_2fd35f86069f62bbc681bd13289c1ab8'} ::: {.cell-output-display}
itemnr item
ls1 Min chef ger mig återkoppling på hur jag utför arbetet.
ls2 Min chef har en god uppfattning om min arbetsbelastning.
ls3 Min chef agerar om jag har allt för mycket arbete att utföra.
ls5 Min chef hanterar konflikter på ett bra sätt.
ls6 Min chef och jag har tillräckligt med avstämningar.
::: ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Item fit ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-24_7d49c0cca22edac568715a9bcc731774'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemfitPCM2(df2, samplesize = 250, nsamples = 32, cpu = 8) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
OutfitMSQ InfitMSQ OutfitZSTD InfitZSTD
ls1 0.718 0.688 -3.457 -3.89
ls2 0.68 0.691 -3.905 -3.643
ls3 0.796 0.773 -2.427 -2.823
ls5 1.056 1.055 0.602 0.755
ls6 0.869 0.909 -1.179 -1.094
````` ::: ::: ### PCA ::: {.cell tbl-cap='PCA of Rasch model residuals' hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-25_fd954468af3711798719a324328fa4e8'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIpcmPCA(na.omit(df2)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Eigenvalues
1.55
1.40
1.07
0.96
0.01
````` ::: ::: ### Residual correlations ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-26_f08112e04ea61739f1d126d0c89c698e'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIresidcorr(df2, cutoff = 0.2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
ls1 ls2 ls3 ls5 ls6
ls1
ls2 -0.07
ls3 -0.19 0.01
ls5 -0.34 -0.38 -0.26
ls6 -0.12 -0.28 -0.43 -0.22
Note:
Relative cut-off value (highlighted in red) is -0.027, which is 0.2 above the average correlation.
````` ::: ::: ### 1st contrast loadings ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-27_3d6308be1d918f86182ea3b8943beed4'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIloadLoc(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-27-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Targeting ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-28_48d7a39e09981a2445a65d4eb1407c08'} ```{.r .cell-code} # increase fig-height above as needed, if you have many items RItargeting(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-28-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Item hierarchy ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-29_5cf3cb0594cc78f38fc289f28985d6fe'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemHierarchy(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-29-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: ### Targeting ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/fig-ldrskp-targ_b9df29284ea342a76d471be4c608e9f1'} ```{.r .cell-code} # increase fig-height above as needed, if you have many items RItargeting(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Targeting för området Ledarskap](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/fig-ldrskp-targ-1.png){#fig-ldrskp-targ width=672} ::: ::: Förutom en något låg item fit för ls2 ser analysens utfall bra ut. Vi går vidare med att undersöka DIF och reliabilitet. ## DIF-analysis En DIF-analys bör inte inkludera svarskategorier med för få svar. Därför har svarskategorier med färre än 50 svar antingen exkluderas eller slagits ihop med andra svarskategorier (se avsnittet om bakgrundsdata för exakt antal svar per ordinarie kategori). DIF-variablerna omkodades till att innehålla följande kategorier: - Kön: man, kvinna - Ålder: 30-39, 40-49, 50-59, 60+ - Bransch: kontorsarbete, ej kontorsarbete - Hemarbete: aldrig eller sällan, en dag, minst två dagar Koden nedan specificerar exakt hur omkodningen gick till. ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-31_4d70a126f125c5efa4afd503fb9adf93'} ```{.r .cell-code} # Omkodning för kön dif.kön <- recode(dif.kön,"'Annat'=NA;'Vill ej uppge'=NA") # Omkodning för ålder dif.ålder <- recode(dif.ålder,"'18-29'=NA") # Omkodning för bransch dif.bransch <- recode(dif.bransch,"'Industri'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Hotell, restaurang, service'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Handel'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Skola, utbildning'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Vård, omsorg'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Byggverksamhet'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Annat'='Ej kontorsarbete'") #Omkodning för hemarbete dif.hemarbete <- recode(dif.hemarbete,"'Fem dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Fyra dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Tre dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Två dagar'='Minst två dagar'") ``` ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Gender ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-32_cdf6b1722b53ed279d8183dcde589361'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.kön) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ### Age ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-33_9ba7ab7c5c06028bb2eda822b07ae56e'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.ålder) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ### Bransch ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-34_36e45f83fe5f848ca55c3e3dfe8c8bb6'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.bransch) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ### Hemarbete ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-35_737666253d9860aef78baddeb137857d'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.hemarbete) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ::: Det verkar finnas mindre DIF-effekter baserade på ålder och kön. Dock är skillnaden i item location inte tillräckligt stor (enligt rekommenderade tröskelvärden) för att motivera exkludering av items. Vi går vidare och undersöker reliabilitet. ## Reliability ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/fig-ldrskp-rel_45366d13b62fd2ae700e8e798b999ac8'} ```{.r .cell-code} RItif(df2, lo = -5, hi = 5) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Reliabilitet för området Ledarskap](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/fig-ldrskp-rel-1.png){#fig-ldrskp-rel width=672} ::: ::: ## Person fit ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-37_79050104cfceb95a10cfc136a60cbebb'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIpfit(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-37-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-37-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Item-parametrar ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-38_ca3f3a0f2948a23c019ecdf9a90b9ec6'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemparams(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Threshold 1 Threshold 2 Threshold 3 Threshold 4 Threshold 5 Item location
ls1 -2.02 -0.15 0.79 2.23 4.20 1.01
ls2 -1.73 -0.14 0.48 1.60 4.14 0.87
ls3 -1.77 0.37 1.24 2.19 3.41 1.09
ls5 -1.29 -0.28 0.69 1.61 3.06 0.76
ls6 -1.71 -0.40 0.27 1.14 2.27 0.31
````` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} #RIitemparams(df2, "itemParams_ldrskp.csv") ``` ::: ## Transformeringstabell ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-39_3bc8737b266bdef94880699c43d8624d'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIscoreSE(df2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}

::: ::: ### Estimering av mätvärden ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-40_793c6aa482557a808fd7f99c3902542b'} ```{.r .cell-code} df2$score <- RIestThetas(df2) write.csv(df2, "scored.csv") summary(df2$score) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Min. 1st Qu. Median Mean 3rd Qu. Max. -4.0000 0.2101 1.2752 1.3107 2.3109 4.0000 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-41_c248bd9a249734502fd941a39de51e8a'} ```{.r .cell-code} #df2 <- read_csv("05_rec/scored.csv") ggplot( data = df2, aes(x = score, y = 0, fill = factor(score)) ) + geom_dotplot(color = "white", dotsize = 1, binwidth = 0.13) + # plot mean value geom_point( aes( x = mean(score), y = 0 ), size = 6, shape = 18, color = "black" ) + # errorbar has brackets at the endpoints geom_errorbar( aes( xmin = mean(score) - sd(score), xmax = mean(score) + sd(score), y = 0, width = 0.025 ), color = "black" ) + theme_minimal(base_family = "Lato") + theme_rise() + coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-4,4)) + scale_color_viridis_d("Antal svar", begin = 0.2, aesthetics = c("fill", "color"), guide = "none" ) + labs( title = "Mätvärden", subtitle = "Värden längre till höger är bättre", caption = "Svart diamant indikerar medelvärde, strecken runt indikerar en standardavvikelse.", y = "Antal respondenter", x = "Mätvärden" ) + theme( #axis.text.x = element_blank(), # remove text from both axes axis.text.y = element_blank() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](06_ldrskp_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-41-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Rekommenderade items ::: {.cell hash='06_ldrskp_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-42_cedfa883972db4499ab460efcbfa2e4a'} ```{.r .cell-code} itemlabels %>% filter(itemnr %in% names(df2)) %>% write_csv("finalItems.csv") itemlabels %>% filter(!itemnr %in% names(df2)) %>% write_csv("removedItems.csv") itemlabels %>% kbl_rise(width = 50, options = "hover") %>% row_spec(c(4), background = "lightpink") %>% footnote(general_title = "Notera: ", "Borttagna item markerade med färg.") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}

````` ::: ::: ### Förändringar i svarskategorier
